hero.heading: Let's find your place in paradise
hero.sub: Whether you're buying, renting, listing, or just exploring — our bilingual team is here to help.

channels.heading: Multiple ways to connect
channels.sub: We're a bilingual team based in the DR. Pick whichever channel works best for you.

items.title: WhatsApp
items.desc: Fastest reply — chat with our team

form.heading: Send us a message
form.message_placeholder: Tell us what you're looking for…
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about my inquiry and accept the privacy policy.

success.heading: Message sent!
success.sub: We'll get back to you within a few hours. In the meantime, feel free to browse listings.

bottom.heading: Explore our resources first
bottom.sub: From buying guides to ROI calculators — everything you need to make a confident decision.
